name: Mahatma Jyotirao Phule Jan Arogya Yojana (MJPJAY)
benefit: Cashless tertiary healthcare cover for eligible low-income families in Maharashtra.

name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY) - Maharashtra
benefit: Health insurance support for hospitalization through empanelled hospitals.

name: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Scheme (MGNREGS)
benefit: Wage employment opportunities for rural households.

name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi (PM-KISAN)
benefit: Direct annual income support to eligible farmer families.

name: Namo Shetkari Mahasanman Nidhi Yojana
benefit: Additional state income support for PM-KISAN beneficiary farmers in Maharashtra.

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY) - Maharashtra
benefit: Crop insurance protection against yield loss and natural calamities.

name: Baliraja Chetana Yojana
benefit: Mental health and support interventions for distressed farmers.

name: Mukhyamantri Saur Krushi Vahini Yojana
benefit: Improved daytime electricity access for agriculture through solar feeder projects.

name: Majhi Kanya Bhagyashree Yojana
benefit: Financial incentive support for families with girl children.

name: Lek Ladki Yojana
benefit: Stage-wise financial assistance for girls from eligible families.

name: Savitribai Phule Scholarship for Girls
benefit: Scholarship support to encourage school and college education for girls.

name: Rajarshi Chhatrapati Shahu Maharaj Scholarship
benefit: Tuition and education fee support for eligible students in higher education.

name: Post Matric Scholarship for SC Students - Maharashtra
benefit: Fee reimbursement and maintenance allowance for SC students.

name: Post Matric Scholarship for OBC Students - Maharashtra
benefit: Educational financial aid for OBC students pursuing post-matric studies.

name: EBC Tuition Fee Waiver Scheme - Maharashtra
benefit: Tuition fee concession for economically weaker students in professional courses.

name: Chief Minister Employment Generation Programme (CMEGP)
benefit: Subsidy-linked support to start micro enterprises in manufacturing and services.

name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana (MUDRA)
benefit: Collateral-free loans for small businesses and entrepreneurs.

name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Urban (PMAY-U) Maharashtra
benefit: Housing assistance and interest subsidy for eligible urban households.

name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Gramin (PMAY-G) Maharashtra
benefit: Financial support to build pucca houses for rural low-income families.

name: Shravan Bal Seva State Pension Scheme
benefit: Monthly pension assistance for eligible elderly citizens in Maharashtra.
